ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "protocol_file" TEXT /* File path to the trial protocol */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution conducting the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial group */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Trial Group, Control Group) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the group */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criteria for the group */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criteria for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_groups_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial group the data belongs to */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week of the measurement */,
  "trial_value" REAL /* Value measured in the trial group */,
  "control_value" REAL /* Value measured in the control group */,
  "percentage_diff" REAL /* Percentage difference between trial and control values */,
  "t_value" REAL /* t-value for the statistical analysis */,
  "upper_conf_inv" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "lower_conf_inv" REAL /* Lower bound of the 5% confidence interval */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mm, kg, etc.) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual entry, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES trial_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the participant is enrolled in */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the participant belongs to */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "informed_consent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has provided informed consent */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES trial_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., PDF, Docx) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view data, download file) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the trial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the rule applies to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the validation rule (e.g., range check, format check) */,
  "rule_params" TEXT /* Parameters for the validation rule in JSON format */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., comment, issue, question) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_versions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_data" TEXT /* Data that was changed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting tool */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the tool belongs to */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting tool */,
  "tool_description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting tool */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated by the tool (e.g., summary, detailed, graphical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_tools_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data usage entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the data */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was used */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Description of the data used */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used (e.g., summary data, raw data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
